loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for the month — per-phase breakdown is not measured for this aggregate panel view.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing historical energy trends for UPS, BPDB, and HHF feeders; rated and contracted reference lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate and contract ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate apparent power (kW) and power quality metrics (THD, PF) from the 8 outgoing feeder members. Per-phase and detailed harmonic breakdowns (h3/h5/h7) are not measured by the member meters and are omitted.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing UPS and BPDB power demand trends — Load Factor is not measured for this asset.
